label.fr: Gouvernance et leadership
label.en: Governance and Leadership

label.fr: Our organization has clearly documented vision statement
label.en: Our organization has clearly documented vision statement

label.fr: Our organization has clearly documented mission statement
label.en: Our organization has clearly documented mission statement

label.fr: The governing body understands the vision and mission of our organization
label.en: The governing body understands the vision and mission of our organization

label.fr: The management and staff understand the vision and mission of our organization
label.en: The management and staff understand the vision and mission of our organization

label.fr: Our organization's programs and projects are in line with the vision and mission
label.en: Our organization's programs and projects are in line with the vision and mission

label.fr: Our organization has an independent governing body with a documented and approved constitution
label.en: Our organization has an independent governing body with a documented and approved constitution

label.en: Our organization has a formal and functioning governing body

label.en: Our governing body reflects a balanced composition in terms of diversity (gender, skills, age, religion, regions, people living with disabilities, etc.)

label.en: Our organization has a clear process of inducting new members of the governing body

label.en: The board/management committee usually reaches a quorum at its meetings in line with the constitution

label.en: The governing body has the authority of making decisions independent from the founders

label.en: The governing body is accessible and available to support organizational growth

label.en: The governing body adheres to the mechanisms of accountability

label.en: The governing body is involved in resource mobilization

label.en: The governing body demonstrates leadership in assessing organization development

label.en: Our organization is a legal entity appropriately registered (or is hosted by a legal entity appropriately registered in the nation)

label.en: The members of the governing body have access to legal advice and services when needed

label.en: Members of the governing body clearly understand their respective roles and responsibilities

label.en: Our board members participate in mobilization of resources for the organization

label.en: Our organization has in place leadership succession procedures and plans

label.en: The governing body is actively involved in review of achievement of strategic goals, financial and resource position of the organization

label.en: Board members consistently attend organization's key program events

label.en: Our organization has in place a conflict of interest policy

label.en: Our organization has a clear membership recruitment strategy

label.en: There is adequate representation of the membership on the board

label.en: Our organization has clear internal co-ordination mechanisms

label.en: Our organization undertakes periodic strategic planning using a participatory process involving board, staff, members and key partners

label.en: Organizational records are organized and well kept

label.en: Our organization keeps an updated inventory of all assets and equipment

label.en: Our organization has developed values that all members of the board, management and staff identify with

label.fr: Gestion financière

label.en: Our organization has documented financial policies and procedures that apply to everyone in the organization without discrimination

label.en: Our organization has fulltime qualified finance staff

label.en: Our organization has clear guidelines on segregation of financial duties

label.en: Our organization consistently prepares timely bank reconciliations

label.en: Our organization prepares and regularly reviews budgets

label.en: All relevant staff participate in developing and reviewing the budgets

label.en: Our organization has a mechanism of recording each donor's income and other in-kind support

label.en: Our organization has policies and procedures that management and staff follow in the purchase of goods and services

label.en: Our organization has a framework that assists with the planning, recording, replacement, maintenance and use of its assets

label.en: Our organization has a travel and expenses policy which includes travel arrangements, methods, approvals, per diem and receipts requirements

label.en: Our organization conducts regular external audits

label.en: Our organization has an accounting software in place

label.en: Our organization notifies all prospective bidders of solicitations for contract bids with sufficient time to respond

label.en: Our organization awards procurement contracts to the qualified bidder that conforms to requirements and offers a reasonable cost

label.en: Our organization has a procurement process that identifies the individuals involved, their roles and the methods used for sourcing suppliers

label.en: Our organization undertakes market surveys using a specific and documented process for maintaining the database of service providers

label.en: Our organization has a procurement committee of qualified individuals with oversight of procurements, with recorded meeting minutes

label.en: Our organization carries out feasibility and option analysis to determine the most economical option ahead of procurement

label.en: Our organization undertakes research on service procurements and conducts interviews for major consultancies and audit services

label.en: Our organization reviews all contract performance before renewal or any extension is granted

label.en: Our organization keeps and maintains records showing amounts due to suppliers that are reconciled regularly with statements from them

label.en: Employee turnover is well managed so that organization's operations do not falter
